title: Android Developer Verification: Threat masquerading as protection
summary:
The article warns of a pre-installed "virus" called "Android Developer Verifier" (ADV) on 4 billion Android 8+ devices, propagated by Google itself through Play Protect. This system service, running with root privileges, is designed to block software from developers not centrally approved by Google once activated.

Google justifies ADV as a malware prevention tool, but the author argues it's a pretext for Google to become the sole gatekeeper of the Android ecosystem, upending open software traditions. Developer registration requires fees, personal information, and agreement to vague terms where "malware" is defined solely by Google, potentially allowing them to ban apps like ad blockers for commercial reasons.

Despite Google's misleading claims of developer support, there is overwhelming global opposition to ADV from individuals, open-source groups (EFF, FSF), and civil rights organizations. This backlash highlights fears that Google's "trust me bro" security model threatens the open-source transparency of platforms like F-Droid, jeopardizing user choice and software freedom.

ADV activation is slated for September 30 in Brazil, Indonesia, Singapore, and Thailand, with global rollout predicted for 2027+. The exact consequences for installing/launching F-Droid apps, existing non-approved applications, user data, and data telemetry remain unknown, raising significant concerns about user rights and privacy.
chinese_title: 安卓开发者认证：披着保护外衣的威胁
chinese_summary:
这篇文章警告称，40亿台安卓8+设备上预装了一个名为“Android开发者验证器”（ADV）的“病毒”，由谷歌通过Play Protect自行传播。这项以root权限运行的系统服务，一旦激活，旨在阻止未经谷歌集中批准的开发者提供的软件。

谷歌将ADV辩解为一种恶意软件预防工具，但作者认为，这只是谷歌成为安卓生态系统唯一守门人的借口，颠覆了开放软件的传统。开发者注册需要费用、个人信息以及同意模糊的条款，其中“恶意软件”完全由谷歌定义，这可能使其能够以商业原因为由，禁止广告拦截器等应用。

尽管谷歌误导性地声称支持开发者，但全球范围内，个人、开源团体（如EFF、FSF）和公民权利组织对ADV表达了压倒性的反对。这种强烈反对凸显了人们的担忧，即谷歌“相信我，伙计”的安全模式威胁到F-Droid等平台的开源透明度，危及用户的选择和软件自由。

ADV计划于9月30日在巴西、印度尼西亚、新加坡和泰国激活，预计2027年及以后在全球范围推出。安装/启动F-Droid应用、现有未经批准的应用、用户数据以及数据遥测的具体后果尚不清楚，这引发了对用户权利和隐私的严重担忧。

title: Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
summary: On June 30, 2026, Anthropic announced that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on its AI models, Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5. As a result, Anthropic plans to begin restoring user access to both models starting July 1, 2026, and will provide further updates soon. The company expressed its gratitude to users for their patience and to everyone who collaborated on redeploying the models.
chinese_title: 商务部已解除对克劳德·费布尔5和秘瑟斯5的出口管制
chinese_summary: 2026年6月30日，Anthropic宣布美国商务部已解除对其AI模型Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的出口管制。因此，Anthropic计划从2026年7月1日起开始恢复用户对这两个模型的访问，并将在不久后提供进一步的更新。该公司对用户的耐心以及所有参与模型重新部署的合作者表达了感谢。

title: Physical disc production ending in Jan 2028 for new games on PlayStation
summary:
Sony Interactive Entertainment announced on July 1, 2026, that it will discontinue physical disc production for all new games releasing on PlayStation consoles starting January 2028. This move is a direct response to a significant shift in consumer preference towards digital formats over physical media.

Following January 2028, all new PlayStation games will be exclusively available in digital formats, purchasable through the PlayStation Store and at other retailers. Sid Shuman, Senior Director of Content Communications, stated that this transition will allow Sony to align more closely with how most of their community prefers to access games and enable them to prioritize resources for innovation in game access.

The company clarified that this change will not impact games already released or those scheduled for release in disc format prior to January 2028. Sony emphasized its commitment to delivering a world-class gaming experience and providing players with choices for purchasing new digital games.
chinese_title: PlayStation平台新游戏的实体光盘生产将于2028年1月结束。
chinese_summary:
索尼互动娱乐于2026年7月1日宣布，从2028年1月起，将停止为所有在PlayStation主机上发行的新游戏生产实体光盘。此举直接回应了消费者偏好从实体媒体向数字格式的显著转变。

2028年1月之后，所有新的PlayStation游戏将独家以数字格式提供，可通过PlayStation Store及其他零售商购买。内容传播高级总监Sid Shuman表示，这一转变将使索尼能够更紧密地契合其大部分社区成员访问游戏的偏好方式，并使其能够优先将资源用于游戏访问方式的创新。

该公司澄清说，这一改变不会影响已经发布的游戏，也不会影响那些计划在2028年1月之前以光盘格式发布的游戏。索尼强调其致力于提供世界一流的游戏体验，并为玩家提供购买新数字游戏的选择。

title: Most arguments are about ego, not ideas
summary:
The author, a former software engineer, recounts his journey from zealously arguing for correctness to understanding the futility of it. He realized that being "correct" isn't inherently "good," as winning an argument creates a loser and often strengthens an opponent's resolve. Most arguments, he contends, are ego-driven, where challenging an idea is perceived as a personal attack, leading to defensive resistance rather than rational discourse.

Humans are primarily emotional, rationalizing feelings rather than reasoning to conclusions, rendering logic ineffective against ingrained beliefs. Correcting others, even with good intentions, is rarely appreciated or effective; people learn best from consequences. The only exception is when individuals explicitly ask for help, signaling an openness to advice.

Instead of debating, the author suggests leveraging differences as an asset, particularly in innovation and business, where unique perspectives create value. Fundamentally, one can only change oneself. Directing energy towards personal growth, through humble feedback-seeking, is far more productive than attempting to alter others. Letting go of the ego's need to win arguments fosters continuous improvement and a more peaceful experience of the world.
chinese_title: Most arguments are about ego, not ideas
chinese_summary:
The author, a former software engineer, recounts his journey from zealously arguing for correctness to understanding the futility of it. He realized that being "correct" isn't inherently "good," as winning an argument creates a loser and often strengthens an opponent's resolve. Most arguments, he contends, are ego-driven, where challenging an idea is perceived as a personal attack, leading to defensive resistance rather than rational discourse.

Humans are primarily emotional, rationalizing feelings rather than reasoning to conclusions, rendering logic ineffective against ingrained beliefs. Correcting others, even with good intentions, is rarely appreciated or effective; people learn best from consequences. The only exception is when individuals explicitly ask for help, signaling an openness to advice.

Instead of debating, the author suggests leveraging differences as an asset, particularly in innovation and business, where unique perspectives create value. Fundamentally, one can only change oneself. Directing energy towards personal growth, through humble feedback-seeking, is far more productive than attempting to alter others. Letting go of the ego's need to win arguments fosters continuous improvement and a more peaceful experience of the world.

title: Sony Deletes 551 Movies PlayStation Owners Paid For
summary:
Sony plans to delete 551 StudioCanal movies and TV shows from PlayStation users' libraries on September 1, without offering refunds. Titles like *Terminator 2* and *Total Recall*, which customers had "bought," will be inaccessible due to "content licensing agreements." Sony confirmed this action after an X user surfaced the notification.

The article highlights that this incident underscores a growing shift from true ownership to mere licensing in the digital sphere. Despite a "buy" button, content stored in a user's "library" can be revoked if upstream contracts change, as per often-unnoticed terms of service.

This trend extends to the gaming industry, exemplified by the upcoming *Grand Theft Auto VI*. Its "physical" version will contain only a download code, not a disc, preventing lending, reselling, or offline play. This move centralizes control with publishers, effectively ending the secondhand market and giving companies unprecedented access control.

The piece concludes that the concept of "ownership" is increasingly being pulled back to accounts and servers controlled by a few corporations, diluting the traditional meaning of "buy" in the digital age.
chinese_title: 索尼下架PlayStation用户已购551部电影
chinese_summary:
索尼计划于9月1日从PlayStation用户的资料库中删除551部StudioCanal电影和电视剧，且不提供退款。用户曾“购买”的《终结者2》和《全面回忆》等影片将因“内容许可协议”而无法访问。在一名X用户公布该通知后，索尼证实了这一行动。

文章指出，这一事件凸显了数字领域从真正的所有权转向仅仅是许可权的一种日益增长的转变。尽管有“购买”按钮，但根据通常不被注意的服务条款，如果上游合同发生变化，存储在用户“资料库”中的内容可能会被撤销。

这一趋势延伸到了游戏行业，即将发布的《侠盗猎车手VI》就是例证。它的“实体版”将只包含一个下载代码，而不是光盘，从而阻止了借阅、转售或离线游玩。此举将控制权集中到发行商手中，有效地终结了二手市场，并赋予公司前所未有的访问控制权。

文章总结道，“所有权”的概念正日益被收回到由少数公司控制的账户和服务器中，稀释了数字时代“购买”的传统含义。

title: Asahi Linux 7.1 Progress Report
summary:
The Asahi Linux 7.1 progress report highlights key advancements and solutions to recent challenges. A critical boot issue emerged with macOS 27, where Apple's boot tooling now requires a specific APFS metadata flag, causing Asahi installations to disappear from the boot picker. This was resolved by chaos_princess, with new Asahi installs automatically setting the flag, and existing ones fixable via the installer or a new Linux tool.

Another macOS 27 update altered the SMC battery management interface, leading to emergency shutdowns in Linux; this was patched in kernel 7.0.12+. The report advises against installing developer betas on production machines.

Significant progress on M3 series machines includes high-quality audio output, CPU frequency switching, big.LITTLE task scheduling, and SMC hardware sensor support, largely due to stable Apple hardware designs and efforts by chaos_princess and Yureka. Core drivers for PCIe, WiFi, Bluetooth, and NVMe are also functional, with installer support for M3 rapidly progressing.

A notable development is the creation of custom firmware for the Apple Video Decoder (AVD). To circumvent Apple's complex, SoC-specific firmware, sofus developed a basic, stateless firmware for the AVD's Cortex-M3, enabling a V4L2 driver to program the AVC hardware directly, supporting 10-bit 4K video. Future plans include VP9, HEVC, and AV1 support.

Finally, m1n1 v1.6.0 was released, now requiring Rust for stage 2 builds. This version integrates GPU initialization and Apple Device Tree parsing in Rust, simplifying kernel drivers, and adds M3 improvements while laying groundwork for M4 and A18 Pro support.
chinese_title: 朝日 Linux 7.1 进度报告
chinese_summary:
Asahi Linux 7.1 进展报告强调了关键进展和近期挑战的解决方案。macOS 27 出现了一个关键的启动问题，苹果的启动工具现在需要特定的 APFS 元数据标志，导致 Asahi 安装从启动选择器中消失。chaos_princess 解决了这个问题，新的 Asahi 安装会自动设置该标志，现有安装则可通过安装程序或新的 Linux 工具修复。

另一个 macOS 27 更新改变了 SMC 电池管理接口，导致 Linux 中出现紧急关机；这个问题已在内核 7.0.12+ 中得到修补。报告建议不要在生产机器上安装开发者测试版。

M3 系列机器取得了显著进展，包括高质量音频输出、CPU 频率切换、big.LITTLE 任务调度以及 SMC 硬件传感器支持，这主要得益于稳定的苹果硬件设计以及 chaos_princess 和 Yureka 的努力。PCIe、WiFi、蓝牙和 NVMe 的核心驱动程序也已可用，M3 的安装程序支持正在快速推进。

一项值得关注的进展是为苹果视频解码器（AVD）创建了自定义固件。为了规避苹果复杂且特定于 SoC 的固件，sofus 为 AVD 的 Cortex-M3 开发了一个基本的无状态固件，使 V4L2 驱动程序能够直接对 AVC 硬件进行编程，支持 10 位 4K 视频。未来计划包括支持 VP9、HEVC 和 AV1。

最后，m1n1 v1.6.0 发布，现在二级构建需要 Rust。该版本在 Rust 中集成了 GPU 初始化和苹果设备树解析，从而简化了内核驱动程序，并增加了 M3 改进，同时为 M4 和 A18 Pro 支持奠定了基础。

title: Godot will no longer accept AI-authored code contributions
summary:
The Godot Foundation is banning AI-authored code contributions, AI agent-submitted pull requests, and AI-generated text in human-to-human communication, citing an unsustainable "slop problem." Maintainers of the open-source game engine have experienced "increasingly draining and demoralizing" work reviewing a rising tide of AI-generated contributions.

This decision aims to reduce the burden on maintainers and protect the mentorship pipeline for new contributors. The Foundation emphasizes that AI cannot take responsibility for code, and contributors must be accountable for understanding and fixing their submissions. Reviewing AI-generated code, which offers no mentorship opportunity, is becoming harder to justify for volunteers.

While AI assistance for "menial things" is acceptable if disclosed, the outright ban on AI-authored code and AI-generated text in communications (excluding machine translations of human-authored text) is a "basic principle of respect." Godot will maintain a conservative approach, re-evaluating policies as AI tools evolve.
chinese_title: 戈多将不再接受 AI 编写的代码贡献
chinese_summary:
Godot基金会正在禁止AI编写的代码贡献、AI代理提交的拉取请求以及人与人交流中AI生成的文本，理由是存在无法持续的“低质问题”。该开源游戏引擎的维护者在审查日益增多的AI生成贡献时，工作变得“越来越耗费精力且令人士气低落”。

这一决定旨在减轻维护者的负担，并保护新贡献者的培养机制。基金会强调AI不能为代码负责，贡献者必须对其提交的内容负起理解和修复的责任。审查AI生成的代码不提供任何指导机会，对志愿者来说越来越难以证明其合理性。

尽管披露后AI辅助“琐碎事务”是可以接受的，但完全禁止AI编写的代码和交流中AI生成的文本（不包括人类编写文本的机器翻译）是一项“基本的尊重原则”。Godot将保持保守态度，随着AI工具的发展重新评估相关政策。
